name: MailerSend
shortDescription: Professional email delivery platform with comprehensive tracking, template support, and real-time webhook notifications for email automation workflows.

actions.name: Send Email
actions.description: Sends an email to the specified recipient.

actions.name: Send Email with CC/BCC
actions.description: Sends an email with support for multiple recipients, CC, and BCC addresses.

actions.name: Send Email with Template
actions.description: Sends an email based on a pre-defined template, with optional personalization and tracking options.

idealUseCases: Transactional email delivery with advanced tracking capabilities
Marketing email campaigns with template personalization
E-commerce order confirmations and shipping notifications
User onboarding and engagement email sequences
Real-time email event monitoring and analytics
Automated email responses based on recipient behavior
Multi-recipient communication with CC and BCC support
Email deliverability optimization and spam prevention
